_comment: Single source of truth for the prebuilt CLI tools bundle (ffmpeg, yt-dlp, ...) the app downloads on first run. Produced and published by scripts/publish-bundled-tools.sh, which builds the tools, uploads the tarball as a GitHub release asset, and rewrites version+sha256 here. The app (BundledToolsInstaller) and the dev script (ensure-bundled-tools.sh) both read this. An empty sha256 means nothing is published yet: the installer no-ops and dev falls back to building from source.
